---
title: "test_network_watcher_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_network_watcher_empire.py"
loc: 21
complexity: 2
logic_score: 5.27
style_score: 3.96
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.94
---

## Intent
The `test_network_watcher_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_network_watcher_detection, test_crucible_pipeline_init. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_network_watcher_detection, test_crucible_pipeline_init. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [src.tools.network_watcher](file://src.tools.network_watcher)

### Exports
- `test_network_watcher_detection`
- `test_crucible_pipeline_init`
